malaysia.notes: Rate-limited before any research could complete. Deferred to next cycle.

maldives.notes: last_qa_date 2026-06-15 added to all 137 sites. Victory Wreck orientation corrected (upright not port-side; 83m confirmed vs 95m false figure). Halaveli site_type pinnacle→wreck (per OSM wreck tags). Kudhi Maa depth 20→30m. Rannamaari depth 42→26m + Advanced→Intermediate. Miyaru Kandu atoll corrected South Male→Vaavu. Keyodhoo warning: wreck drifted off reef early 2025, coordinates unreliable. 124 sites: generic attribution replaced with honest 'no site-specific sources found'. MV Xlendi orientation CRITICAL FIX: lies on starboard side (capsized), not upright. MV Karwela location: Xatt l-Ahmar Gozo (not North Malta).

malta-and-gozo.notes: 119 sites (was 121: removed Mgarr-ix-Xini CSV duplicate + Sliema House Reef alias). 81 JSON field corrections. Critical entry_type fixes: Big Bear→shore, Washing Machine→shore, Xwejni Bay→shore, Xatt l-Ahmar→shore, Canyon→boat, Blue Lagoon Tunnel→boat. Bottleneck Cave depth 20→37m (technical 37-58m, NOT recreational). Alex Cave depth 20→16m. Jesus of Qawra depth 25→35m. Site types: Filfla reef→wall, Madonna reef→cave, Anchor Bay reef→cave, Ahrax Bay reef→cave, Mellieha reef→beach. HMD Trusty Star designation corrected (not HMS). HMS Urge: NOT a recreational dive site — war grave/expedition only. Tower wreck opening date corrected Aug 2023 (not 2024). Douglas Skyraider + HMS Russell NOT WWII (1947 peacetime + WWI 1916). Sliema House Reef removed (alias). Xemxija Bay + St George Bay flagged unverified. Spitfire conflicts: pilot name conflict unresolved. 2 Junkers JU88 wrecks (North 55m + South 106m).
